code: import React from'react';import{Home,LayoutDashboard,Bell,Database,FileBarChart,Users,Activity,Settings}from'lucide-react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const NAV_ITEMS=[{id:'home',label:'Home',icon:Home},{id:'dashboards',label:'Dashboards',icon:LayoutDashboard},{id:'alerts',label:'Alerts',icon:Bell},{id:'data-sources',label:'Data Sources',icon:Database},{id:'reports',label:'Reports',icon:FileBarChart},{id:'user-management',label:'User Management',icon:Users},{id:'system-status',label:'System Status',icon:Activity},{id:'settings',label:'Settings',icon:Settings}];export default function Sidebar(_ref){let{activeNavId='home',onNavChange}=_ref;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("aside",{className:"layout-sidebar","aria-label":"Main navigation",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"layout-sidebar__brand",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"layout-sidebar__brand-mark","aria-hidden":true,children:"O"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"layout-sidebar__brand-text",children:"OpSight"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("nav",{className:"layout-sidebar__nav",children:NAV_ITEMS.map(_ref2=>{let{id,label,icon:Icon}=_ref2;const isActive=id===activeNavId;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("button",{type:"button",className:'layout-sidebar__link'+(isActive?' layout-sidebar__link--active':''),"aria-current":isActive?'page':undefined,onClick:()=>onNavChange&&onNavChange(id),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Icon,{size:20,strokeWidth:2,"aria-hidden":true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:label})]},id);})})]});}
